responses.mock_model_b: Clear day urban two-lane road. Car swerves across divider causing frontal crash with oncoming truck; both vehicles stop damaged at impact point.
Overcast city street with parked cars. Minivan attempts merge, contacts black car frontally; both halt with minor front damage, pedestrians nearby unaffected.
Snowy two-lane rural road, three vehicles in sequence. Lead car loses control on slick surface; truck and trailing car skid, all come to rest off alignment.
Daylight urban traffic; red van brakes abruptly prompting sharp stop of following vehicle; near-miss rather than collision, illustrates sudden braking risk.
Multi-vehicle highway crash initiated by vehicle crossing lanes into opposing traffic causing severe head-on impact; debris scattered, no pedestrians visible.
